data.description: The UK CMA orders AA Driving School and BSM Driving School to refund more than 80,000 customers and pay a £4.2 million penalty

data.title: Advancing a New Standard for Neonatal Training Across Europe: European Master Programme in Neonatology Officially Certified
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Geneva, the European School of Neonatology (ESN) revealed that their Master of Advanced Studies in Neonatology received certification from the Foundation for International Business Administration Accreditation (FIBAA). This accreditation signifies the quality and standards of the programme.
Hermès' revenue in Q1 2026 hits record high.

data.title: Navigator Gas Announces Signing of Non-Binding Letter of Intent for Sale of Eight Gas Vessels and Its Shareholding in Unigas Joint Venture
data.description: Yesterday, London-based Navigator Holdings Ltd. signed a non-binding letter of intent with Bernhard Schulte (Singapore) Holdings Pte. Ltd. and Sloman Neptun Schiffahrts-Aktiengesellschaft for the sale of eight gas carriers and the Company’s shareholding in Unigas International B.V. joint venture for approximately $183 million. Navigator Gas is the owner of the largest fleet of handysize liquefied gas carriers globally. The deal is anticipated to be completed soon, as announced on April 15, 2026.

data.title: VAALCO Energy, Inc. Announces Participation in Water Tower Research Virtual Insights Conference
data.description: Houston-based VAALCO Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EGY; LSE: EGY) will be part of Water Tower Research’s Virtual Conference on April 15, 2026, at 3:50 p.m. Eastern Time. Jeff Robertson from WTR will host a discussion with George Maxwell, Vaalco’s CEO, and Director, covering the Company’s asset portfolio activity, strategic outlook, and capital management strategy. The event will also be available at 2:50 p.m. Central Time and 8:50 p.m. London Time.

data.title: Stellantis estimates Q1 2026 consolidated shipments at 1.4M units, up 12% year-over-year.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 4.2%. This decrease is credited to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. The report also highlighted a noticeable increase in wages, with average earnings now at $25.50 per hour, up 3.6% from the previous year. Additionally, it was noted that the labor force participation rate has risen to 63.8%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Experts predict that this positive trend in the job market is likely to continue in the upcoming months.

data.title: Fake Ledger app stealing $9.5M from crypto investors removed by Apple, developer terminated from app store - Cointelegraph
data.description: Apple has confirmed that the fraudulent Ledger Live app has been successfully removed from its app store. The developer responsible for creating the fake app has also been dismissed. The unauthorized app was downloaded by approximately [number] users before it was taken down. Apple has reassured customers of their commitment to maintaining a secure and trustworthy app store environment.

data.title: In 2025, Crypto Valley saw a 37% funding increase, with $728M raised in 31 deals. TON deal contributed $400M.
data.description: In 2025, the Crypto Valley secured a substantial $728 million through 31 deals, surpassing the worldwide growth in blockchain funding. This surge was notably boosted by a $400 million transaction for TON, contributing significantly to the overall total raised.

data.title: Hunting PLC (“Hunting” or “the Company” or “the Group”) AGM and Q1 2026 Trading Update
data.description: London-based precision engineering group, Hunting PLC (LSE: HTG), released a Trading Update for Q1 2026 before its Annual General Meeting held at 10:30 a.m. BST in London. CEO Jim Johnson stated that the company had a strong Q1 performance and confirmed their full-year EBITDA guidance of $145-$155 million due to positive end market projections.
